narrative.narrative: As Bitcoin hovers around $62K, a familiar sideways regime takes hold, echoing the summer of 2024's market dynamics. Despite low Fear & Greed levels, traders tread cautiously, awaiting clear signals before committing capital.
narrative.headline: Bitcoin's Summer Siesta: Will History Repeat?
